subject: refactor(theme): adopt DaisyUI component classes for steps, skeleton, join, modal, progress, divider, loading
body:
Replace custom multi-class Tailwind patterns with DaisyUI component
utilities that handle states, animations, and theming automatically.

Components adopted:
- steps: NewImportWizard step indicator (25 lines → 8 lines)
- skeleton: SkeletonLoader pulse animation (built-in to class)
- join + join-item: CashflowGraph, WorkspaceForm toggle button groups
- modal + modal-box + modal-backdrop: 4 modal files (eliminates
  fixed/absolute/z-index/bg-black boilerplate)
- progress: WorkspaceListView pull-to-refresh, ImportStepReview ML bars
- divider: BurgerMenu, DetailView, ListView, InstallInstructionsModal
- loading loading-spinner: TransactionEditModal (removes Loader2 import)

Intentionally skipped:
- HelpDrawer → DaisyUI drawer: designed for page sidebars, not modal
  overlay panels with custom entry/exit animation timing
- BottomSheet → DaisyUI drawer: has custom drag-to-close gesture
- ToastNotification → DaisyUI toast: custom safe-area positioning

Tags: theme, daisyui, refactor, cleanup
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-migration
Semver: minor
